description_en: Scopes LLM projects and designs practical research-agent architectures.
description_zh: 判断任务是否适合 LLM，并设计研究型 agent 架构。

description_en: Researches across Notion and synthesizes cited briefs and reports.
description_zh: 在 Notion 中检索资料、整理证据，并生成带引用的简报和报告。

description_en: Captures conversations, notes, and decisions into structured Notion pages.
description_zh: 把对话、笔记和决策沉淀为结构化 Notion 页面。

description_en: Prepares agendas, pre-reads, and decision docs in Notion.
description_zh: 结合已有上下文准备会议议程、预读材料和决策文档。

description_en: Orchestrates literature review, experiments, synthesis, and paper-writing workflows.
description_zh: 编排文献调研、实验迭代、结果综合和论文写作流程。

description_en: Guides structured ideation for high-impact research directions.
description_zh: 用结构化框架帮助发现高价值研究方向。

description_en: Applies creativity frameworks to generate less obvious research ideas.
description_zh: 使用创造性思维框架生成更有新意的研究想法。

description_en: Looks up current OpenAI product and API documentation with source-grounded guidance.
description_zh: 核对最新 OpenAI 产品和 API 文档，并给出有来源依据的建议。

description_en: Finds and compares candidate models using official Hugging Face benchmark leaderboards and metadata.
description_zh: 基于 Hugging Face 官方 benchmark leaderboard 和元数据筛选、比较候选模型。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Explains how context works in agent systems.
description_zh: 解释 agent 系统里的上下文机制。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Diagnoses lost-in-the-middle and other context failure modes.
description_zh: 诊断 lost-in-the-middle 等上下文退化问题。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Compresses long sessions while preserving critical state.
description_zh: 在保留关键状态的前提下压缩长会话。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Applies caching, masking, compaction, and partitioning to extend effective context capacity.
description_zh: 通过缓存、masking、compaction 和 partitioning 提升有效上下文容量。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Uses files as an overflow layer for scratch pads, shared agent memory, and just-in-time context loading.
description_zh: 把文件系统作为上下文溢出层，用于草稿、共享记忆和按需加载。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Studies KV-cache style latent handoff for reducing token cost in orchestrator-worker systems.
description_zh: 研究用 KV cache 式 latent handoff 降低 orchestrator-worker 系统的 token 成本。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Builds evaluation frameworks for agent systems with rubrics, regressions, and quality gates.
description_zh: 为 agent 系统构建 rubric、回归检测和质量门禁。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Covers LLM-as-a-judge and bias-aware automated evaluation.
description_zh: 覆盖 LLM-as-a-judge 与偏差控制评测。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Designs supervisor, swarm, and hierarchical multi-agent systems with clearer coordination.
description_zh: 设计 supervisor、swarm 和层级式多 agent 系统。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Designs persistent agent memory and evaluates retrieval quality across sessions.
description_zh: 设计跨会话持久记忆，并评估长期检索质量。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Designs agent-facing tools and MCP interfaces with clearer contracts and less ambiguity.
description_zh: 设计更适合 agent 使用的工具和 MCP 接口，减少歧义。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Uses declarative prompt programming and optimizers for structured agent workflows.
description_zh: 用声明式提示编程和优化器构建结构化 agent 工作流。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Controls generation with regexes and grammars for structured outputs and multi-step prompting.
description_zh: 用正则和语法约束生成，适合结构化输出和多步提示流程。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Produces Pydantic-validated structured outputs for extraction, labeling, and automation.
description_zh: 用 Pydantic 校验结构化输出，适合信息抽取、标注和自动化。

category_zh: 上下文与 Agent 设计
description_en: Constrains generation with grammars and finite-state machines for structured outputs.
description_zh: 用语法和有限状态机约束生成结构化输出。

description_en: Creates and reviews DOCX documents with rendering checks.
description_zh: 创建和检查 DOCX 文档，并关注渲染结果。

description_en: Reads, creates, and reviews PDFs when layout and rendering matter.
description_zh: 读取、生成并检查 PDF，适合关注版式和渲染的文档工作。

description_en: Publishes papers on Hugging Face Hub and manages paper metadata.
description_zh: 在 Hugging Face Hub 上发布论文，并管理论文元数据。

description_en: Writes publication-oriented ML, AI, and systems papers.
description_zh: 面向发表场景撰写 ML、AI 和系统论文。

description_en: Provides paragraph-level blueprints for OSDI, SOSP, ASPLOS, NSDI, and EuroSys papers.
description_zh: 为 OSDI、SOSP、ASPLOS、NSDI、EuroSys 等系统论文提供段落级结构蓝图。

description_en: Transcribes interviews, meetings, or recorded talks with optional speaker diarization.
description_zh: 转写访谈、会议或录音讲座，并可选做说话人区分。

description_en: Runs multilingual speech recognition and translation for interviews, lectures, podcasts, and audio corpora.
description_zh: 用 Whisper 做多语种语音识别与翻译，适合访谈、讲座、播客和音频语料。

description_en: Looks up Hugging Face paper pages and structured paper metadata.
description_zh: 查询 Hugging Face 论文页和结构化论文元数据。

description_en: Builds document ingestion and retrieval pipelines for research corpora.
description_zh: 搭建研究语料的文档接入与检索管线。

description_en: Provides high-performance dense retrieval for paper collections.
description_zh: 为论文库提供高性能向量检索。

description_en: Generates embeddings for literature search, clustering, and retrieval.
description_zh: 生成用于文献检索、聚类和召回的语义向量。

description_en: Builds Gradio web UIs and interactive research demos in Python.
description_zh: 用 Python 构建 Gradio Web UI 和交互式研究 demo。

description_en: Tracks training metrics, alerts, and dashboards with Hugging Face Trackio.
description_zh: 用 Hugging Face Trackio 跟踪训练指标、告警和可视化面板。

description_en: Generates publication-quality charts, ablations, and architecture figures.
description_zh: 生成论文级图表、消融图和架构图。

description_en: Turns papers into Beamer or PPTX talk decks with speaker notes and scripts.
description_zh: 把论文整理成 Beamer 或 PPTX 报告，并附 speaker notes 和讲稿。

description_en: Generates narration, accessibility reads, and voiceovers via the OpenAI Audio API.
description_zh: 通过 OpenAI Audio API 生成旁白、无障碍朗读和配音音频。

description_en: Creates or edits bitmap figures, mockups, infographics, and visual assets.
description_zh: 生成或编辑位图视觉素材，适合论文插图、信息图、mockup 和 demo 资产。

description_en: Runs Hugging Face models in JavaScript for browser-side demos and interactive artifacts.
description_zh: 在浏览器或 Node.js 中运行 Hugging Face 模型，适合网页 demo 和交互式研究产物。

description_en: Generates figures, concept art, and presentation assets for multimodal research.
description_zh: 为多模态研究生成插图、概念图和展示素材。

description_en: Creates clean, reproducible Jupyter notebooks for experiments and tutorials.
description_zh: 创建结构清晰、可复现的 Jupyter Notebook。

description_en: Manages Hugging Face auth, repos, papers, datasets, buckets, jobs, and endpoints from the `hf` CLI.
description_zh: 用 `hf` CLI 管理 Hugging Face 认证、仓库、论文、数据集、bucket、jobs 和 endpoints。

description_en: Explores Dataset Viewer API metadata, rows, search, filters, parquet URLs, and statistics.
description_zh: 通过 Dataset Viewer API 浏览元数据、行数据、搜索、过滤、parquet 链接和统计信息。

description_en: Adds and manages evaluation results in model cards and custom HF Hub evaluations.
description_zh: 把评测结果写入模型卡，并管理 HF Hub 上的自定义评测。

description_en: Builds reusable scripts around the Hugging Face API for metadata collection and automation.
description_zh: 围绕 Hugging Face API 构建可复用脚本，用于元数据采集和自动化。

description_en: Selects GGUF models, quantization levels, and llama.cpp commands for local inference.
description_zh: 选择 GGUF 模型、量化档位和 llama.cpp 命令，支持本地推理。

description_en: Scales batch inference, preprocessing, and multimodal ETL from one machine to clusters.
description_zh: 把批量推理、预处理和多模态 ETL 从单机扩展到集群。

description_en: Curates training corpora with deduplication, quality filtering, PII redaction, and multimodal cleanup.
description_zh: 通过去重、质量过滤、PII 清洗和多模态清理构建训练语料。

description_en: Tracks experiments, sweeps, artifacts, and model registries.
description_zh: 跟踪实验、超参搜索、产物和模型注册表。

description_en: Handles experiment tracking, model registry, deployment, and autologging workflows.
description_zh: 处理实验跟踪、模型注册、部署和 autologging 流程。

description_en: Visualizes scalars, embeddings, profiles, and training diagnostics.
description_zh: 可视化标量、嵌入、性能 profile 和训练诊断信息。

description_en: Adds tracing, evaluation, and monitoring to LLM research workflows.
description_zh: 给 LLM 研究工作流增加 tracing、评估和监控。

description_en: Provides open-source tracing, evaluation, and experiment analysis.
description_zh: 提供开源 tracing、评测和实验分析能力。

description_en: Trains or fine-tunes language models with TRL on Hugging Face Jobs, including SFT, DPO, GRPO, and reward models.
description_zh: 在 Hugging Face Jobs 上用 TRL 训练或微调语言模型，覆盖 SFT、DPO、GRPO 和 reward model。

description_en: Trains detection and classification models with Transformers Trainer on Hugging Face Jobs or locally.
description_zh: 在本地或 Hugging Face Jobs 上用 Transformers Trainer 训练检测和分类模型。

description_en: Provides YAML-first fine-tuning workflows for LoRA, QLoRA, DPO, and multimodal training.
description_zh: 使用 YAML-first 工作流微调模型，覆盖 LoRA、QLoRA、DPO 和多模态训练。

description_en: Provides WebUI and CLI workflows for low-code fine-tuning across language and multimodal models.
description_zh: 提供 WebUI 和 CLI 的低代码微调流程，支持语言与多模态模型。

description_en: Accelerates LoRA and QLoRA fine-tuning with lower memory use for local experiments.
description_zh: 以更低显存和更高速度进行 LoRA/QLoRA 微调，适合本地实验。

description_en: Covers parameter-efficient fine-tuning with LoRA, QLoRA, DoRA, and adapters.
description_zh: 覆盖 LoRA、QLoRA、DoRA 等参数高效微调方法。

description_en: Uses TRL for post-training workflows such as SFT, DPO, PPO, GRPO, and reward-model training.
description_zh: 用 TRL 完成 SFT、DPO、PPO、GRPO 和 reward model 等后训练流程。

description_en: Specializes in GRPO-based post-training for reasoning, verifiable tasks, and custom rewards.
description_zh: 面向推理、可验证任务和自定义奖励函数的 GRPO 后训练。

description_en: Runs standardized LLM benchmarks such as MMLU, HumanEval, GSM8K, and TruthfulQA.
description_zh: 运行 MMLU、HumanEval、GSM8K、TruthfulQA 等标准 LLM benchmark。

description_en: Benchmarks code models with HumanEval, MBPP, MultiPL-E, and pass@k workflows.
description_zh: 用 HumanEval、MBPP、MultiPL-E 和 pass@k 流程评测代码模型。

description_en: Runs reproducible multi-backend benchmarking across LLM and VLM benchmarks.
description_zh: 通过多后端流程做可复现的 LLM/VLM benchmark。

description_en: Serves LLMs with high-throughput inference and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
description_zh: 以高吞吐方式部署大模型，并提供 OpenAI 兼容接口。

description_en: Serves LLMs and VLMs with fast structured generation, prefix caching, and JSON/tool-calling workflows.
description_zh: 用结构化生成和前缀缓存服务 LLM/VLM，适合 JSON 和 tool-calling。

description_en: Runs quantized LLMs on CPUs, Apple Silicon, and non-CUDA hardware.
description_zh: 在 CPU、Apple Silicon 和非 CUDA 硬件上运行量化大模型。

description_en: Guides optimized CUDA kernel writing and benchmarking for Hugging Face diffusers and transformers.
description_zh: 指导为 Hugging Face diffusers 和 transformers 编写、评测优化 CUDA kernel。

description_en: Supports mechanistic interpretability with HookPoints, activation caching, and causal tracing.
description_zh: 用 HookPoints、activation cache 和 causal tracing 研究 transformer 内部机制。

description_en: Trains and analyzes sparse autoencoders for monosemantic feature discovery and superposition research.
description_zh: 训练和分析 sparse autoencoders，用于单义特征发现和 superposition 研究。

description_en: Runs local or remote interpretability experiments on PyTorch models, including very large models via NDIF.
description_zh: 在本地或 NDIF 远程环境中做可解释性实验，适合超大 PyTorch 模型。

description_en: Performs causal interventions, activation patching, and interchange intervention training on PyTorch models.
description_zh: 在 PyTorch 模型上做因果干预、activation patching 和 interchange intervention training。

description_en: Compiles papers, repos, logs, and notes into Agent-Native Research Artifacts with claims, evidence, and provenance.
description_zh: 把论文、代码仓库、实验日志和笔记编译成带 claims、evidence 和 provenance 的 Agent-Native Research Artifact。

description_en: Records end-of-session research decisions, experiments, dead ends, and provenance into an ARA directory.
description_zh: 在会话结束时把研究决策、实验、失败路径和来源记录进 ARA 目录。

description_en: Reviews Agent-Native Research Artifacts for evidence relevance, falsifiability, scope, coherence, and rigor.
description_zh: 从证据相关性、可证伪性、范围、论证连贯性和方法严谨性审查 ARA。
